sections.paragraph:
ἀοίκητος, ον (Hes., Hdt. et al.; pap [imperial per.]; LXX; TestNapht 3:5 [Charles brackets ἀ.]) uninhabited, uninhabitable τὸ χωρίον … γενέσθαι the property of Judas had become uninhabitable Papias (3:3) (v.l. ἄοικον s. next entry).

Hes Hes , date uncertain, perh. before VI b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

per. per. = period

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

TestNapht TestNapht = Testament of Naphthali, s. Test12Patr—List 2

Charles Charles = RC., Revelation (ICC); also used in connection with Test12Patr—Lists 2, 6

Papias Papias , early Christian writer, II a.d.—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 94
